items.title: Critically appraised papers: Adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone for degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain [synopsis].
items.summary: This critically appraised paper, based on a systematic review and meta-analysis of five RCTs (n=912), found that adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages did not improve pain or function more than home exercise alone for degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain.
items.curatedReason: 对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝痛，无论额外增加物理治疗干预还是激励性短信，短期效果均未超越单纯家庭运动方案。这提示你在资源有限或依从性不佳时，可以优先考虑患者能独立完成的家庭运动。
items.titleZh: 评价性论文：退行性半月板撕裂和膝痛患者，增加物理治疗或激励短信并未比单纯家庭运动更好地改善疼痛 [摘要]
items.summaryZh: 这项基于5项RCT（n=912）的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝痛患者，额外增加物理治疗或激励性短信，在改善疼痛或功能方面并未优于单纯家庭运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: For degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain, neither additional physiotherapy nor motivational text messages showed superior short-term outcomes compared to home exercise alone. This suggests prioritizing independent home exercise for patients, especially when resources are limited or adherence is a concern.
items.limitation: 本研究的随访期较短，未能评估长期效果。
items.limitationEn: The study had a short follow-up period, precluding evaluation of long-term effects.

items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [commentary].
items.summary: This commentary highlights that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease.
items.curatedReason: 基于移动设备的肺康复方案，在改善运动能力方面与中心化方案相当，并且在健康状态上表现更优。这意味着远程肺康复是 COPD 患者的可行且有益的选择，能有效扩大服务覆盖面。
items.titleZh: 评价性论文：基于移动设备的肺康复改善运动能力与中心化康复相当，且健康状态改善更优 [评论]
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论文章指出，对于慢性阻塞性肺疾病患者，基于移动设备的肺康复在改善运动能力方面与中心化肺康复相当，且在健康状态方面表现更优越。
items.curatedReasonEn: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation is comparable to center-based programs in improving exercise capacity and superior in enhancing health status. This indicates remote pulmonary rehabilitation is a viable and beneficial option for COPD patients, effectively expanding service access.
items.limitation: 作为一篇评论性文章，其结论的证据等级取决于原始研究的质量。
items.limitationEn: As a commentary, the strength of its conclusions depends on the quality of the original research.

items.title: Development of a Core Patient-Reported Outcome (Measures) Set for Pediatric Physical Therapy.
items.summary: A study developed a core set of nine patient-reported outcomes (PROs) and corresponding measures (PROMs) for pediatric physical therapy, grouped into three domains (functioning, general well-being, and social/environmental), to standardize assessment in practice, research, and quality assessment.
items.curatedReason: 核心患者报告结局（PROs）及其测量工具（PROMs）的开发，能帮助儿科物理治疗师在日常实践、研究和质量评估中更标准化地评估疗效。未来可期待其推广应用，提升儿科PT的循证实践水平。
items.titleZh: 儿科物理治疗核心患者报告结局（测量）集的开发
items.summaryZh: 一项研究开发了一套包含九个核心患者报告结局（PROs）及其测量工具（PROMs），分为三个领域（功能、整体健康和社会/环境），旨在标准化儿科物理治疗在实践、研究和质量评估中的疗效评估。
items.limitation: PROs 和 PROMs 的开发是一个复杂过程，其最终的临床实用性和心理测量学特性仍需在不同人群中进行广泛验证。
items.limitationEn: The development of PROs and PROMs is a complex process, and their ultimate clinical utility and psychometric properties still require extensive validation across diverse populations.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Improved Flexor Spasticity in Patients with Chronic Stroke Using a Dynamic Wrist-Hand Stretching Device: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A pilot RCT involving 30 chronic stroke patients found that a novel dynamic wrist-hand stretching device improved flexor spasticity and hand function, offering a potential tool for long-term management.
items.curatedReason: 这款动态腕手牵伸器械在慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛管理上，显示出改善痉挛和手功能潜能，为需要居家长期管理又缺乏监督的患者提供了新工具。可以开始关注同类器械的临床验证与可及性。
items.titleZh: 动态腕手牵伸器械改善慢性卒中患者屈肌痉挛：一项初步随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入30名慢性卒中患者的初步随机对照试验发现，一款新型动态腕手牵伸器械能改善屈肌痉挛并提升手功能，为长期管理提供了潜在工具。
items.curatedReasonEn: This dynamic wrist-hand stretching device shows potential in managing flexor spasticity and improving hand function in chronic stroke patients, offering a new tool for those requiring long-term home management with minimal supervision. Start monitoring the clinical validation and availability of similar devices.
items.limitation: 这是一项小样本的初步随机对照试验，结果可能无法完全推广至更广泛的卒中人群，且长期效果有待进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot randomized controlled trial with a small sample size, so the results may not be fully generalizable to a broader stroke population, and long-term efficacy needs further validation.

items.title: Amplifying the Work of Emerging Leaders in Hip/Groin Pain Research
items.summary: This editorial highlights and amplifies the work of emerging leaders in hip and groin pain research.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论旨在推广青年研究者在髋/腹股沟疼痛领域的工作。对于了解该领域未来发展方向有一定参考。
items.titleZh: 弘扬髋/腹股沟疼痛研究领域新兴领导者的工作
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论旨在推广和表彰在髋关节及腹股沟疼痛研究领域中新兴领导者的工作。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial aims to promote the work of emerging researchers in hip/groin pain. It offers some insight into the future direction of this field.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Frontline agreement in diagnosis and treatment for musculoskeletal dysfunctions. A prospective, randomized, controlled study.
items.summary: This RCT found high agreement in diagnosis, treatment, and discharge decisions between physiotherapists (APP role) and resident physicians compared to senior physicians for non-urgent musculoskeletal conditions in the emergency department.
items.curatedReason: 在急诊场景中，物理治疗师（APP）与住院医师在骨科诊断、治疗及出院决策上与资深医师的判断高度一致。这意味着在骨骼肌肉疾病的早期管理中，物理治疗师可以承担更重要的角色，减轻急诊压力。
items.titleZh: 骨骼肌肉功能障碍诊断与治疗一线方案：前瞻性随机对照研究
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验发现，在急诊科处理非紧急骨骼肌肉疾病时，物理治疗师（APP）与住院医师在诊断、治疗和出院决策上与资深医师的判断高度一致。
items.curatedReasonEn: In the ED, advanced practice physiotherapists (APPs) showed high agreement with senior physicians on musculoskeletal diagnoses, treatments, and discharge decisions, mirroring resident physicians. This supports expanding the PT's role in early MSK management within emergency settings to alleviate ED burden.
items.limitation: 本研究为单中心试验。
items.limitationEn: This was a single-center study.

items.title: Understanding Adult Hip Dysplasia: Clinical Presentation, Assessment Techniques, and Exercise-Driven Management Strategies
items.summary: This review provides an overview of adult hip dysplasia, focusing on its clinical presentation, assessment techniques, and exercise-driven management strategies to improve recognition and intervention.
items.curatedReason: 了解成人髋关节发育不良的临床表现、评估技术和运动驱动管理策略，能帮助你更早识别并有效干预这种往往被忽视的疾病。
items.titleZh: 理解成人髋关节发育不良：临床表现、评估技术和运动驱动管理策略
items.summaryZh: 本综述概述了成人髋关节发育不良，重点关注其临床表现、评估技术和运动驱动管理策略，以期提高疾病识别和干预效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding the clinical presentation, assessment techniques, and exercise-driven management strategies for adult hip dysplasia helps you identify and effectively intervene in this often-overlooked condition earlier.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Perplexing Pubic Pain: How Clinicians Might Approach Assessing and Managing Pubic-Related Groin Pain in Athletes
items.summary: This article discusses assessment and management strategies for pubic-related groin pain in athletes, offering clinicians a systematic approach to this complex condition.
items.curatedReason: 处理运动员耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛是一项挑战。这篇文章提供了一个评估和管理策略的临床思路，有助于你更系统地诊断和干预。
items.titleZh: 令人困惑的耻骨疼痛：临床医生如何评估和管理运动员耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了临床医生如何评估和管理运动员耻骨相关腹股沟疼痛的策略，为这一复杂病症提供了系统性方法。
items.curatedReasonEn: Managing pubic-related groin pain in athletes is challenging. This article offers a clinical framework for assessment and management strategies, helping you systematically diagnose and intervene.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Evaluating a 3-Month Physical Impairment and Functional Performance-Based Rehabilitation Program After Hip Arthroscopy for Femoroacetabular Impingement (FAI) Syndrome
items.summary: This study evaluated a 3-month physical impairment and functional performance-based rehabilitation program following hip arthroscopy for femoroacetabular impingement (FAI) syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究评估了髋关节镜术后股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）的 3 个月康复方案。这为你提供了术后康复方案设计的实证参考，特别是注重身体功能障碍和功能表现的训练。
items.titleZh: 髋关节镜治疗股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）后为期 3 个月的基于身体功能障碍和功能表现的康复方案评估
items.summaryZh: 本研究评估了髋关节镜治疗股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）后为期 3 个月的基于身体功能障碍和功能表现的康复方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study evaluated a 3-month post-hip arthroscopy rehabilitation program for femoroacetabular impingement (FAI) syndrome. This provides evidence-based guidance for designing post-operative rehabilitation, particularly focusing on physical impairment and functional performance.
items.limitation: 未明确提及对照组。
items.limitationEn: No control group was explicitly mentioned.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This perspective argues for the importance of identifying and treating early-stage symptomatic hip osteoarthritis, particularly in young adults, as a window of opportunity to alter disease trajectory, similar to approaches for knee OA.
items.curatedReason: 早期有症状的髋关节骨关节炎可能是一个重要的干预窗口期，特别是年轻患者。作为物理治疗师，识别和干预早期病变有望改变疾病进程，避免晚期并发症。
items.titleZh: 早期有症状的髋关节骨关节炎：一个干预良机
items.summaryZh: 本述评强调识别和治疗早期有症状的髋关节骨关节炎的重要性，尤其是在年轻人中，认为这是一个改变疾病进程的干预良机，类似于膝关节骨关节炎的干预策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early-stage symptomatic hip osteoarthritis, especially in younger adults, presents a crucial intervention window. As a PT, early identification and intervention could alter disease trajectory and prevent later complications.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

related.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity

items.title: Lived Experiences and Health Care Perspectives of People With Femoroacetabular Impingement (FAI) Syndrome: A Systematic Review of Qualitative Studies
items.summary: This systematic review of qualitative studies explores the lived experiences and healthcare perspectives of individuals with femoroacetabular impingement (FAI) syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究系统综述揭示了髋关节股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的生活体验和医疗视角。了解患者的真实感受有助于你更好地设计以患者为中心的康复方案。
items.titleZh: 髋关节股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的生活体验和医疗视角：定性研究系统综述
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究的系统综述探讨了髋关节股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者的生活体验和医疗视角。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review of qualitative studies reveals the lived experiences and healthcare perspectives of individuals with femoroacetabular impingement (FAI) syndrome. Understanding patient experiences helps you design more patient-centered rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 定性研究的外推性可能有限。
items.limitationEn: Generalizability of qualitative studies may be limited.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Prevalence of Symphyseal Radiographic Findings and Skeletal Maturity and Their Relationship With Groin Symptoms in PROfessional FEmale Football Players: A Multicenter Cohort Study
items.summary: This multicenter cohort study investigated the prevalence of symphyseal radiographic findings and skeletal maturity, and their relationship with groin symptoms in professional female football players.
items.curatedReason: 这项多中心队列研究探讨了职业女子足球运动员耻骨联合影像学表现、骨骼成熟度与腹股沟症状的关系。这有助于你理解女性运动员特有的风险因素，优化预防和管理策略。
items.titleZh: 职业女子足球运动员耻骨联合影像学表现、骨骼成熟度与腹股沟症状的关系：一项多中心队列研究
items.summaryZh: 这项多中心队列研究调查了职业女子足球运动员耻骨联合影像学表现、骨骼成熟度及其与腹股沟症状的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multicenter cohort study investigates the relationship between symphyseal radiographic findings, skeletal maturity, and groin symptoms in professional female football players. This helps you understand unique risk factors in female athletes for optimizing prevention and management strategies.
items.limitation: 观察研究无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: Observational studies cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Hip Muscle Strength Is Associated With Symptom Severity in People With Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome, but Only in Those With Preexisting Hip Muscle Weakness: A Secondary Analysis of Baseline Data From a Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A secondary analysis of RCT baseline data found that hip muscle strength is associated with symptom severity in people with femoroacetabular impingement syndrome, but only in those with preexisting hip muscle weakness.
items.curatedReason: 这项对 RCT 基线数据的二次分析表明，髋关节肌肉力量与股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）症状严重程度相关，但这仅限于那些已有髋关节肌肉无力的人群。这意味着在评估和干预时要区分患者的基础肌肉力量状况。
items.titleZh: 髋关节肌肉力量与股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者症状严重程度相关，但仅限于已有髋关节肌肉无力者：一项随机对照试验基线数据的二次分析
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验基线数据的二次分析发现，髋关节肌肉力量与股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAI）患者症状严重程度相关，但仅限于那些已有髋关节肌肉无力的人群。
items.curatedReasonEn: This secondary analysis of RCT baseline data indicates that hip muscle strength is associated with symptom severity in FAI syndrome, but only in those with preexisting hip muscle weakness. This means you should differentiate patients based on baseline muscle strength when assessing and intervening.
items.limitation: 为二次分析，且仅限于基线数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a secondary analysis, limited to baseline data.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Correlates of Loneliness in Persons with Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: This study explores correlates of loneliness in persons with spinal cord injury, identifying factors that contribute to social isolation in this population.
items.curatedReason: 脊髓损伤患者的孤独感与多种因素相关。了解这些关联有助于你在康复计划中更好地识别和解决患者的社会心理需求，改善整体生活质量。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤患者孤独感的相关因素
items.summaryZh: 本研究探讨了脊髓损伤患者孤独感的相关因素，旨在识别导致该人群社会隔离的因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Loneliness in individuals with spinal cord injury is correlated with various factors. Understanding these associations helps you better identify and address patients' psychosocial needs in rehabilitation plans, improving overall quality of life.
items.limitation: 观察研究无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: Observational studies cannot establish causality.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Could Hip Dysplasia Be the Problem?
items.summary: This editorial prompts clinicians to consider hip dysplasia as a potential underlying cause for various hip issues, encouraging its inclusion in differential diagnoses for hip pain.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论提出，髋关节发育不良可能是许多髋部问题的根源。在评估髋部疼痛时，不要忘记将髋关节发育不良纳入鉴别诊断，这能拓宽你的临床思维。
items.titleZh: 髋关节发育不良会是问题所在吗？
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论提示临床医生将髋关节发育不良视为多种髋关节问题的潜在原因，鼓励在髋部疼痛的鉴别诊断中考虑此项。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial suggests that hip dysplasia might be the root cause of many hip problems. When evaluating hip pain, remember to include hip dysplasia in your differential diagnosis to broaden your clinical perspective.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Efficacy and Modulating Factors of Repetitive Transcranial Magnetic Stimulation on Motor Function in Parkinson's Disease: A Meta-Analysis.
items.summary: This meta-analysis evaluated the short-term and long-term therapeutic effects of repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) on motor function in Parkinson's disease, comparing rTMS with sham stimulation and investigating modulating factors.
items.curatedReason: 该荟萃分析确认了重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病运动功能的短期和长期疗效。在为PD患者考虑辅助治疗时，将其作为选项之一，并关注刺激部位和频率等调节因素。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激对帕金森病运动功能的疗效和调节因素：一项荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项荟萃分析评估了重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）对帕金森病患者运动功能的短期和长期治疗效果，并比较了rTMS与假刺激的效果，同时探讨了调节因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis confirms the short-term and long-term efficacy of repetitive transcranial magnetic stimulation (rTMS) on motor function in Parkinson's disease. Consider it an option when evaluating adjunctive therapies for PD patients, paying attention to modulating factors like stimulation site and frequency.
items.limitation: 荟萃分析纳入的研究可能存在异质性，且效果量可能因纳入研究的质量和偏倚风险而有所不同。
items.limitationEn: The included studies in the meta-analysis may have heterogeneity, and effect sizes might vary due to the quality and risk of bias of the included studies.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review established weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury to address high recurrence rates, analyzing studies from PubMed, Sportdiscuss, WOS, and Scielo databases.
items.curatedReason: 该系统综述为腘绳肌损伤后重返运动建立了加权标准。这能帮助您更精细地评估患者何时能安全重返训练和比赛，降低再受伤风险。
items.titleZh: 腘绳肌损伤后重返运动加权标准的建立：一项系统综述和方法学质量分析
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述建立了腘绳肌损伤后重返运动的加权标准，以应对高复发率，分析了来自PubMed、Sportdiscuss、WOS和Scielo数据库的研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review establishes weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury. This can help you more precisely assess when patients can safely return to training and competition, reducing re-injury risk.
items.limitation: 研究未明确提供加权标准的具体内容和证据等级，需要进一步查看原文以获取详细信息。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly provide the specific content and evidence levels of the weighted criteria; further review of the original text is needed for details.

items.title: Shortwave diathermy for managing knee osteoarthritis: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: This systematic review with meta-analysis of 17 trials (1,372 participants) found shortwave diathermy (SWD) significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]; p < .01) and walking ability (mean -0.72; 95% CI [-1.15, -0.29]) in knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 该荟萃分析有力支持短波透热疗法（SWD）能显著改善膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者的疼痛和行走能力。在KOA治疗方案中，可以更肯定地考虑使用SWD。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法治疗膝骨关节炎：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项包含17项试验（1,372名参与者）的系统综述与荟萃分析发现，短波透热疗法（SWD）显著改善了膝骨关节炎患者的疼痛（平均值-2.13；95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]；p < .01）和行走能力（平均值-0.72；95% CI [-1.15, -0.29]）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis strongly supports that shortwave diathermy (SWD) significantly improves pain and walking ability in knee osteoarthritis (KOA) patients. You can more confidently consider using SWD in KOA treatment protocols.
items.limitation: 该荟萃分析纳入的17项研究可能存在异质性，结果的证据确定性需进一步评估。
items.limitationEn: The 17 trials included in this meta-analysis may have heterogeneity, and the certainty of evidence for the results needs further assessment.

items.title: Physical Activity in Women With Obesity: Fatigue, Knee Symptoms, and Functional Capacity.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study of 85 women with obesity examined the associations of functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers with physical activity levels, finding these domains are concurrently linked to physical activity.
items.curatedReason: 此横断面研究阐明了肥胖女性的身体活动水平与功能能力、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍之间的关联，为您临床评估和制定干预计划提供参考。
items.titleZh: 肥胖女性的身体活动：疲劳、膝关节症状与功能能力
items.summaryZh: 这项对85名肥胖女性进行的横断面研究探讨了功能能力、肌肉骨骼症状和感知障碍与身体活动水平之间的关联，发现这些领域与身体活动同时相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study clarifies the associations between physical activity levels, functional capacity, musculoskeletal symptoms, and perceived barriers in women with obesity, informing your clinical assessment and intervention planning.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系，且样本量较小（85名女性）。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional study cannot establish causality and has a small sample size (85 women).
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Preoperative physiotherapy and one-year patient-reported outcomes after primary total knee arthroplasty: a registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients.
items.summary: A registry-based cohort study of 1,688 patients found that those receiving preoperative physiotherapy before primary total knee arthroplasty showed improved KOOS-PS, pain, Forgotten Joint Score, and EQ-5d-5L at 2 months and 1 year postoperatively.
items.curatedReason: 这项大型队列研究支持术前物理治疗能改善全膝关节置换术后1年患者报告结局。在制定术前康复路径时，应纳入该考量。
items.titleZh: 初次全膝关节置换术前的物理治疗与术后一年患者报告结局：一项1,688名患者的注册研究队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项基于注册数据的队列研究，对1,688名患者进行，发现初次全膝关节置换术前接受物理治疗的患者，在术后2个月和1年时，KOOS-PS、疼痛、被遗忘关节评分和EQ-5d-5L均有改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: This large cohort study supports that preoperative physiotherapy improves 1-year patient-reported outcomes after total knee arthroplasty. Include this consideration when developing preoperative rehabilitation pathways.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性队列研究，尽管样本量较大，但仍存在混杂因素的可能性，无法完全排除选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational cohort study; despite the large sample size, confounding factors and selection bias cannot be entirely ruled out.

items.title: Decision support in the management of musculoskeletal disorders: a qualitative study of physiotherapists' and patients' experiences.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the experiences of 11 patients and 10 physiotherapists with SupportPrim PT, an AI-powered clinical decision support system for musculoskeletal disorders, finding it influences decision-making processes.
items.curatedReason: AI驱动的临床决策支持系统（CDSS）正在进入物理治疗领域。了解PT和患者对其的体验，有助于您未来评估和整合此类技术。
items.titleZh: 肌肉骨骼疾病管理中的决策支持：物理治疗师和患者经验的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了11名患者和10名物理治疗师对SupportPrim PT（一种用于肌肉骨骼疾病的AI临床决策支持系统）的体验，发现它影响了决策过程。
items.curatedReasonEn: AI-driven Clinical Decision Support Systems (CDSS) are entering physical therapy. Understanding PT and patient experiences with them will help you evaluate and integrate such technologies in the future.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（10名物理治疗师和11名患者），结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size (10 physiotherapists and 11 patients), limiting generalizability.

items.title: Stroke-specific Movement Patterns During Passage Through a Narrow-Opening: A Cross-Sectional Study.
items.summary: This study with 23 individuals with stroke classified stroke-specific movement patterns when passing through narrow openings and identified factors associated with these patterns, showing impaired trunk rotation and foot adjustments.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究揭示了卒中患者通过狭窄通道时的特异性运动模式。在康复训练中，应关注这些特异模式以优化空间限制下的功能表现。
items.titleZh: 卒中特异性运动模式通过狭窄开口：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 这项对23名卒中患者进行的研究，对通过狭窄开口时的卒中特异性运动模式进行了分类，并确定了与这些模式相关的因素，显示出躯干旋转和支撑脚调整受损。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study reveals stroke-specific movement patterns when navigating narrow openings. Incorporate attention to these specific patterns in rehabilitation training to optimize functional performance under spatial constraints.
items.limitation: 本研究样本量较小（23名卒中患者），且为横断面设计，无法反映康复过程中的变化。
items.limitationEn: This study has a small sample size (23 stroke individuals) and is cross-sectional, thus not reflecting changes during rehabilitation.

items.title: Self-management in neurological disorders: a scoping review of behavior change theories, strategies, contents, and impact.
items.summary: This scoping review identified and mapped behavior change theories and techniques in 18 self-management interventions for neurological conditions (stroke, spinal cord injury, multiple sclerosis), aiming to improve functioning outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 该范围综述描绘了神经疾病患者自我管理干预中行为改变理论和技术的应用。这为您设计或评估康复方案中的自我管理组件提供了理论框架和实用工具。
items.titleZh: 神经系统疾病中的自我管理：行为改变理论、策略、内容和影响的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 这项范围综述识别并描绘了针对神经系统疾病（卒中、脊髓损伤、多发性硬化症）的18项自我管理干预中行为改变理论和技术，旨在改善功能结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review maps the application of behavior change theories and techniques in self-management interventions for neurological disorders. This provides a theoretical framework and practical tools for you to design or evaluate self-management components in rehabilitation programs.
items.limitation: 本范围综述纳入的研究数量有限（18项），且干预措施和行为改变技术的异质性较高。
items.limitationEn: This scoping review included a limited number of studies (18), and there was high heterogeneity in interventions and behavior change techniques.

items.title: The Perspective and Needs of Older Adults With Osteoporosis With a Recent Upper Extremity Fragility Fracture Concerning Fall Risk and Fear of Falling.
items.summary: This qualitative study explored the perspectives of older adults with osteoporosis who had upper extremity fractures, focusing on their health concerns, the impact of falls and fear of falling on daily life, and their views on rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了骨质疏松老年患者上肢脆性骨折后对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法和需求。在制定康复计划时，应将这些心理社会因素纳入考量，以提高依从性和效果。
items.titleZh: 近期上肢脆性骨折的骨质疏松老年患者对跌倒风险和跌倒恐惧的看法和需求
items.summaryZh: 这项定性研究探讨了近期发生上肢骨折的骨质疏松老年患者的观点，重点关注他们的健康问题、跌倒及跌倒恐惧对日常生活的影响以及他们对康复的看法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals older adults' perspectives and needs regarding fall risk and fear of falling after upper extremity fragility fractures due to osteoporosis. Integrate these psychosocial factors into rehabilitation planning to enhance adherence and outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小，结果是基于患者的主观叙述，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size, and its findings are based on subjective patient narratives, limiting generalizability.

items.title: PRISM-MX for Post-Stroke Spasticity: Cross-Cultural Adaptation and Preliminary Psychometric Evaluation in a Mexican Sample.
items.summary: This cross-sectional pilot study of 30 adults with post-stroke spasticity in Mexico successfully cross-culturally adapted the Patient-Reported Impact of Spasticity Measure (PRISM) into Mexican Spanish (PRISM-MX) and showed good internal consistency.
items.curatedReason: PRISM-MX 量表在墨西哥卒中后痉挛患者中的跨文化适应和初步验证，有助于您在该人群中评估痉挛对患者报告结局的影响。
items.titleZh: PRISM-MX用于卒中后痉挛：在墨西哥样本中的跨文化适应和初步心理测量评估
items.summaryZh: 这项对墨西哥30名卒中后痉挛成人进行的横断面试点研究，成功将痉挛患者报告影响量表（PRISM）跨文化改编为墨西哥西班牙语（PRISM-MX），并显示出良好的内部一致性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The cross-cultural adaptation and preliminary validation of the PRISM-MX scale in Mexican post-stroke spasticity patients can help you assess the impact of spasticity on patient-reported outcomes in this population.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面初步验证性研究，样本量较小（30名患者），且仅评估了内部一致性和初步收敛效度。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional pilot study has a small sample size (30 patients) and only evaluated internal consistency and preliminary convergent validity.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: This hospital-based study in Cameroon included 94 children with cerebral palsy, finding that 38.3% accessed physiotherapy early (before 5 months) and 38.3% showed good adherence, with factors related to both identified.
items.curatedReason: 这项喀麦隆研究揭示了脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗的依从性及其相关因素。在您管理类似低资源环境下的脑瘫患者时，了解这些障碍能帮助您优化服务设计。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗及其依从性：一项基于医院的研究
items.summaryZh: 这项基于喀麦隆医院的研究纳入了94名脑瘫儿童，发现38.3%的儿童早期（5个月前）接受了物理治疗，38.3%的儿童表现出良好依从性，并识别出相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Cameroon study reveals adherence to early physiotherapy in children with cerebral palsy and related factors. Understanding these barriers can help you optimize service design when managing similar patients in low-resource settings.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面回顾性/前瞻性混合设计，且在单一国家（喀麦隆）进行，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This study is a mixed retrospective and prospective cross-sectional design, conducted in a single country (Cameroon), limiting generalizability.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Recent highlights in motor recovery and rehabilitation research after stroke.
items.summary: This systematic review identified 118 RCTs, protocols, and systematic reviews with meta-analyses published since 2020, highlighting recent advances in upper and/or lower limb motor training in adults with stroke and providing recommendations for future trials.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述总结了卒中后运动恢复和康复研究的最新进展，指明了未来研究方向。你可以利用这些信息来更新你的临床实践，并了解哪些创新干预具有高水平证据支持。
items.titleZh: 卒中后运动恢复和康复研究的最新亮点。
items.summaryZh: 这项系统综述识别了 2020 年以来发表的 118 项随机对照试验、研究方案和荟萃分析的系统综述，重点介绍了卒中成人上肢和/或下肢运动训练的最新进展，并为未来的试验提供了建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review summarizes recent advances in motor recovery and rehabilitation research after stroke, highlighting future research directions. You can use this information to update your clinical practice and understand which innovative interventions are supported by high-level evidence.
items.limitation: 本综述纳入的研究主要是随机对照试验和系统综述，但可能仍存在发表偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This review primarily included RCTs and systematic reviews, but publication bias may still exist.

items.title: Smallest worthwhile effect of anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction compared with non-surgical management: a benefit-harm trade-off study.
items.summary: This benefit-harm trade-off study (N=92) estimated the smallest worthwhile effect of anterior cruciate ligament (ACL) reconstruction compared with rehabilitation only for improving knee function and return to sport, and explored associations with participant characteristics.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究估计了前交叉韧带重建与非手术管理在改善膝关节功能和重返运动方面的最小有益效应。这有助于你与患者进行共同决策，理解不同治疗方案的实际效益和风险权衡。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建与非手术管理在最小有益效应上的比较：一项效益-危害权衡研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项效益-危害权衡研究（N=92）估计了前交叉韧带 (ACL) 重建与仅康复治疗在改善膝关节功能和重返运动方面的最小有益效应，并探讨了与参与者特征的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study estimated the smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction versus non-surgical management for improving knee function and return to sport. This aids your shared decision-making with patients by clarifying the practical benefits and risk trade-offs of different treatment options.
items.limitation: 本研究通过在线调查进行，结果可能受到参与者回忆偏倚和自我选择偏倚的影响。
items.limitationEn: This study was conducted via an online survey, so the results may be subject to recall bias and self-selection bias from participants.

items.title: Patterns of Outcome Measure Utilization in Stroke Rehabilitation Lower Extremity Trials Conducted in Low-to-Middle versus High-Income Countries.
items.summary: This systematic review (N=1,548 RCTs) found that low-to-middle income countries (LMICs) more frequently use generalized impairment and activities of daily living outcome measures relying on patient observation compared to high-income countries (HICs) in post-stroke lower extremity motor rehabilitation trials.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述揭示了高收入国家与中低收入国家在卒中康复中下肢结局指标使用模式的差异。在临床实践中，你需要关注这些测量工具的文化和资源适用性，尤其是在多元化患者群体中。
items.titleZh: 中低收入国家与高收入国家卒中康复下肢试验中结局指标的使用模式。
items.summaryZh: 这项纳入 1,548 项 RCT 的系统综述发现，在卒中后下肢运动康复试验中，中低收入国家比高收入国家更频繁地使用依赖患者观察的全身性损伤和日常生活活动结局指标。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review reveals differences in lower extremity outcome measure utilization patterns between high-income and low-to-middle-income countries in stroke rehabilitation. In clinical practice, you need to consider the cultural and resource applicability of these measurement tools, especially in diverse patient populations.
items.limitation: 本系统综述仅纳入英文 RCT，可能遗漏其他语言的重要研究。
items.limitationEn: This systematic review only included English RCTs, potentially missing important studies in other languages.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Anti-Compensatory Saccades Changes After Visuo-Vestibular Physical Therapy in People With Acute Unilateral Vestibulopathy: A Prospective Observational Study.
items.summary: This prospective observational study (N=92) found that an 8-week structured visuo-vestibular physical therapy (VVPT) program significantly improved anti-compensatory saccades (AcS) assessed by SHIMP in people with acute unilateral vestibulopathy.
items.curatedReason: 结构化视听前庭物理治疗 (VVPT) 能改善急性单侧前庭病变患者的反补偿性扫视。这提示 VVPT 可能促进中枢代偿，你可以将 SHIMP 测试作为评估治疗效果和患者预后的潜在指标。
items.titleZh: 急性单侧前庭病变患者经视听前庭物理治疗后反补偿性扫视的变化：一项前瞻性观察研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项纳入 92 名急性单侧前庭病变患者的前瞻性观察研究发现，为期 8 周的结构化视听前庭物理治疗 (VVPT) 项目显著改善了通过 SHIMP 评估的反补偿性扫视。
items.curatedReasonEn: Structured visuo-vestibular physical therapy (VVPT) improves anti-compensatory saccades in people with acute unilateral vestibulopathy. This suggests VVPT may promote central compensation, and you can consider the SHIMP test as a potential indicator for assessing treatment effects and patient prognosis.
items.limitation: 本研究为前瞻性观察研究，缺乏对照组，无法排除自然恢复对结果的影响。
items.limitationEn: This was a prospective observational study without a control group, so the influence of natural recovery on the results cannot be excluded.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Prioritising fall prevention strategies in Parkinson's disease: A multi-method evaluation.
items.summary: This multi-method study integrating a structured narrative review, Delphi process (N=15 experts), and Best-Worst Method quantitatively prioritized fall prevention strategies for people with Parkinson's disease.
items.curatedReason: 这项多方法研究量化了帕金森病跌倒预防策略的优先级，对临床实施具有重要指导意义。在为帕金森病患者制定跌倒预防计划时，你可以参考这些被专家优先推荐的策略。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病跌倒预防策略的优先级排序：一项多方法评估。
items.summaryZh: 这项整合了结构化叙述性综述、Delphi 法（15 名专家）和最佳-最差法的多方法研究，量化了帕金森病患者跌倒预防策略的优先级。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multi-method study quantifies the prioritization of fall prevention strategies in Parkinson's disease, offering significant guidance for clinical implementation. When developing fall prevention plans for Parkinson's patients, you can refer to these expert-recommended strategies.
items.limitation: 本研究的专家共识部分基于有限的专家数量，可能存在地域和专业背景偏倚。

items.title: Associations of neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing with rehabilitation outcomes in patients with stroke.
items.summary: This prospective observational study found that neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing are common after stroke and are associated with poorer rehabilitation outcomes, including functional status and quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化与较差的康复结局相关。在评估卒中患者时，你需要重视对这两种情况的识别和管理，这可能影响患者的功能恢复和生活质量。
items.titleZh: 神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化与卒中患者康复结局的关联。
items.summaryZh: 这项前瞻性观察研究发现，卒中后神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化常见，并与较差的康复结局相关，包括功能状态和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: Post-stroke neuropathic pain and pain catastrophizing are associated with poorer rehabilitation outcomes. When assessing stroke patients, you need to prioritize identifying and managing these conditions, as they can affect patients' functional recovery and quality of life.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性研究，无法建立神经病理性疼痛和疼痛灾难化与康复结局之间的因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational study, so it cannot establish a causal relationship between neuropathic pain, pain catastrophizing, and rehabilitation outcomes.

items.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes.
items.summary: This pragmatic quasi-experimental study (N=72) found that a 12-week exergaming intervention (Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) significantly improved physical, psychological, and social outcomes in institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia.
items.curatedReason: 为期 12 周的体感游戏干预（如 Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure）对机构养老的老年肌少症患者在身体、心理和社会功能上均有益。你可以考虑将此类互动性游戏纳入老年康复方案，作为提升多领域结局的有效工具。
items.titleZh: 体感游戏对机构养老老年肌少症患者的多领域益处：身体、心理和社会结局。
items.summaryZh: 这项纳入 72 名机构养老老年肌少症患者的准实验研究发现，为期 12 周的体感游戏干预（任天堂 Switch 健身环大冒险）显著改善了患者的身体、心理和社会结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: A 12-week exergaming intervention (e.g., Nintendo Switch Ring Fit Adventure) benefits institutionalized older adults with sarcopenia across physical, psychological, and social outcomes. You can consider integrating such interactive games into geriatric rehabilitation programs as an effective tool for improving multi-domain outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究为准实验设计，缺乏随机化，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This was a quasi-experimental design lacking randomization, which may introduce selection bias.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Multi-Domain Benefits of Exergaming for Sarcopenia Management in Institutionalized Older Adults: Physical, Psychological, and Social Outcomes

items.title: Short-term effects of therapeutic massage alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy in myofascial pain syndrome: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: This RCT (N=60) found that therapeutic massage, alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy, significantly improved pain, pressure pain threshold, muscle activity, functional disability, and quality of life in individuals with chronic upper trapezius myofascial pain syndrome in the short term.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 发现，对于肌筋膜疼痛综合征，治疗性按摩单独使用或与常规物理治疗结合，在改善疼痛和功能方面短期内有效。将其作为辅助手段纳入治疗方案是合理的。
items.titleZh: 治疗性按摩单独或结合常规物理治疗对肌筋膜疼痛综合征的短期疗效：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 这项纳入 60 名慢性上斜方肌肌筋膜疼痛综合征患者的随机对照试验发现，治疗性按摩单独使用或与常规物理治疗结合，在短期内显著改善疼痛、压痛阈值、肌肉活动、功能障碍和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT found that therapeutic massage, alone or combined with conventional physiotherapy, is effective in the short term for improving pain and function in myofascial pain syndrome. Incorporating it as an adjunct in your treatment plan is reasonable.
items.limitation: 本研究的随访期较短，未能评估长期疗效。
items.limitationEn: The study had a short follow-up period, so long-term efficacy could not be assessed.

items.title: The WalkBack (walking and education) program for prevention of low back pain is acceptable to physiotherapists but relies on training, flexibility and system-level enablers to optimise implementation: a qualitative study.
items.summary: This qualitative study of 20 Australian physiotherapists found that the WalkBack (walking and education) program for low back pain prevention is acceptable, but successful implementation depends on training, flexibility, and system-level enablers.
items.curatedReason: WalkBack 项目（步行和教育）在预防复发性腰痛方面，物理治疗师认为可接受，但其有效实施依赖于充分培训、方案灵活性以及系统层面的支持。在诊所推行类似项目时，你需要关注这些实施障碍。
items.titleZh: WalkBack（步行和教育）腰痛预防项目对物理治疗师来说是可接受的，但其优化实施有赖于培训、灵活性和系统层面的支持：一项定性研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项对 20 名澳大利亚物理治疗师进行的定性研究发现，WalkBack（步行和教育）腰痛预防项目是可接受的，但其成功实施依赖于充分培训、方案灵活性和系统层面的支持。
items.curatedReasonEn: The WalkBack program (walking and education) for recurrent low back pain prevention is acceptable to physiotherapists, but its effective implementation relies on adequate training, program flexibility, and system-level support. When implementing similar programs in your clinic, address these barriers.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，结果可能受访谈者主观感知影响，且样本量较小。
items.limitationEn: This was a qualitative study, so results may be influenced by interviewees' subjective perceptions, and the sample size was small.

items.title: Developing a patient decision aid for Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome: A mixed-methods study.
items.summary: This mixed-methods study developed and user-tested a patient decision aid comparing non-surgical management and hip arthroscopy for femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (FAIS), including a military-related section.
items.curatedReason: 患者决策辅助工具的开发对股骨髋臼撞击综合征 (FAIS) 的非手术管理和髋关节镜手术的选择至关重要。作为临床医生，你可以借鉴此类工具的设计理念，优化你与患者的共同决策过程。
items.titleZh: 股骨髋臼撞击综合征患者决策辅助工具的开发：一项混合方法研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项混合方法研究开发并用户测试了一项患者决策辅助工具，用于比较股骨髋臼撞击综合征 (FAIS) 的非手术管理和髋关节镜手术，并额外增加了与军事相关的部分。
items.curatedReasonEn: The development of patient decision aids is crucial for shared decision-making in femoroacetabular impingement syndrome (FAIS), particularly regarding non-surgical management versus hip arthroscopy. As a clinician, you can draw from the design principles of such tools to optimize your patient consultations.
items.limitation: 本研究为混合方法研究，主要关注决策辅助工具的开发和用户测试，而非其对临床结局的直接影响。
items.limitationEn: This was a mixed-methods study focused on the development and user-testing of a decision aid, not its direct impact on clinical outcomes.

items.title: Inter-rater reliability and construct validity of a cross-diagnostic movement quality score for rehabilitation assessment.
items.summary: This cross-sectional study (N=84) found that a Movement Quality Score (MQS) had good inter-rater reliability (ICC [2,1] = 0.98) and construct validity with FIM motor total scores (ρ = 0.77) across neurological, musculoskeletal, and internal medical conditions in hospitalized patients.
items.curatedReason: MQS 在康复评估中显示出良好的评定者间信度和结构效度，意味着它可能是评估多种诊断患者运动质量的可靠工具。你可以在你的临床实践中考虑引入该量表进行评估。
items.titleZh: 跨诊断运动质量评分在康复评估中的评定者间信度和结构效度。
items.summaryZh: 这项纳入 84 名住院患者的横断面研究发现，运动质量评分 (MQS) 在神经、肌肉骨骼和内科疾病患者中具有良好的评定者间信度 (ICC [2,1] = 0.98) 和与 FIM 运动总分的结构效度 (ρ = 0.77)。
items.curatedReasonEn: The MQS demonstrated good inter-rater reliability and construct validity in rehabilitation assessment, suggesting it could be a reliable tool for assessing movement quality across various diagnostic groups. Consider incorporating this scale into your clinical practice.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面设计，无法评估 MQS 在患者康复过程中的敏感性或预测价值。
items.limitationEn: This was a cross-sectional study, so it could not assess the sensitivity or predictive value of MQS during patient rehabilitation.

items.title: Online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease: rehabilitation and fitness professionals' experiences to inform physiotherapy practice and service delivery - a qualitative interview study.
items.summary: This qualitative interview study with 10 rehabilitation and fitness professionals explored their experiences delivering online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease (PwP), highlighting current practices and challenges for informing physiotherapy practice.
items.curatedReason: 物理治疗师和健身专业人员对帕金森病患者在线团体运动的经验，对于优化远程康复服务至关重要。你在设计和实施在线运动项目时，应考虑这些实践经验，确保服务质量和可及性。
items.titleZh: 帕金森病患者在线团体运动：康复和健身专业人员的经验，以指导物理治疗实践和服务交付——一项定性访谈研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项对 10 名康复和健身专业人员进行的定性访谈研究，探讨了他们为帕金森病患者提供在线团体运动的经验，以期指导物理治疗实践和服务交付。
items.curatedReasonEn: The experiences of physiotherapists and fitness professionals in delivering online group exercise for people with Parkinson's disease are crucial for optimizing telerehabilitation services. When designing and implementing online exercise programs, you should consider these practical insights to ensure service quality and accessibility.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量较小，结论可能不具普遍代表性。
items.limitationEn: This was a qualitative study with a small sample size, so the findings may not be broadly representative.

items.title: Early rehabilitation in trauma patients: an observational study from two Norwegian trauma centers.
items.summary: This observational cohort study (N=317) from two Norwegian trauma centers found that only 10% of severely injured trauma patients received assessment by a physical and rehabilitation medicine specialist within 72 hours, falling short of national recommendations.
items.curatedReason: 挪威创伤中心对重伤患者的早期康复服务（尤其物理和康复医学专家的会诊）并未达到国家建议水平。这提示你，即使有指南，实际临床实践中也可能存在执行缺口，尤其在早期干预方面。
items.titleZh: 创伤患者的早期康复：一项来自两家挪威创伤中心的观察性研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项来自两家挪威创伤中心、纳入 317 名患者的观察性队列研究发现，仅有 10% 的重伤创伤患者在 72 小时内接受了物理和康复医学专家的评估，未达到国家建议水平。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early rehabilitation services for severely injured trauma patients in Norwegian trauma centers, especially consultations by physical and rehabilitation medicine specialists, fall short of national recommendations. This suggests that even with guidelines, there can be implementation gaps in clinical practice, particularly regarding early intervention.
items.limitation: 本研究为观察性队列研究，数据来自挪威创伤登记处和病历，可能存在数据收集偏倚。
items.limitationEn: This was an observational cohort study, with data collected from the Norwegian Trauma Registry and medical records, which may introduce data collection bias.

items.title: Promoting Client-Centered Communication in Rehabilitation: Strategies for Managing Difficult Conversations
items.summary: This perspective piece emphasizes the importance of client-centered communication strategies for managing difficult conversations in rehabilitation contexts, highlighting their role in building trust and improving outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 在康复实践中，有效管理困难对话对建立以患者为中心的沟通和维护医患关系至关重要。你需要掌握相关的沟通策略，以支持适应性强、建立信任的沟通。
items.titleZh: 在康复中促进以客户为中心的沟通：管理困难对话的策略。
items.summaryZh: 这篇述评强调了在康复环境中，以客户为中心的沟通策略对于管理困难对话的重要性，并指出其在建立信任和改善结局方面的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: Effectively managing difficult conversations in rehabilitation practice is crucial for client-centered communication and maintaining the clinician-client relationship. You need to master relevant communication strategies to support adaptive, trust-building communication.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Efficacy of an Intensive Community-Based Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy in Reducing Upper Extremity Impairment after Stroke: Small Retrospective Cohort Study
items.summary: This small retrospective cohort study found that a community-based, high-dose, high-intensity Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy intervention effectively reduced upper extremity motor impairment in community-dwelling stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 基于社区的高剂量、高强度虚拟现实干预（如 Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy）在减少卒中后上肢损伤方面显示出潜力。这提示你，这类技术可能有助于提高社区康复的可及性和效果。
items.titleZh: 高强度社区型下一代神经动画疗法在减少卒中后上肢损伤方面的疗效：小型回顾性队列研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项小型回顾性队列研究发现，社区型高剂量、高强度下一代神经动画疗法干预能有效减少社区卒中幸存者的上肢运动损伤。
items.curatedReasonEn: Community-based, high-dose, high-intensity virtual reality interventions (e.g., Next-Generation NeuroAnimation Therapy) show potential in reducing post-stroke upper extremity impairment. This suggests that such technologies could enhance the accessibility and effectiveness of community rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本研究为回顾性队列研究，且样本量较小，结果可能存在混杂因素影响，并限制了外推性。
items.limitationEn: This was a retrospective cohort study with a small sample size, so results may be influenced by confounding factors and have limited generalizability.

items.title: Immediate and Sustained Effects of Contralateral Handgrip Exercise on Hand Edema in Patients with Stroke.
items.summary: This B-A-B single-case design study found that rhythmic handgrip exercises performed with the non-paretic hand immediately and sustainably reduced hand edema in patients more than 3 months post-stroke.
items.curatedReason: 对侧手握力运动能即时且持续地减轻卒中患者手部水肿，为你提供了一种简单有效的辅助干预手段。在康复计划中，可以考虑指导患者进行健侧手的主动运动来管理患侧水肿。
items.titleZh: 对侧手握力运动对卒中患者手部水肿的即时和持续效应。
items.summaryZh: 这项采用 B-A-B 单案例设计的研究发现，在卒中 3 个月以上的患者中，健侧手进行的节律性手握力运动能即时且持续地减轻手部水肿。
items.curatedReasonEn: Contralateral handgrip exercise can immediately and sustainably reduce hand edema in stroke patients, offering you a simple yet effective adjunctive intervention. In rehabilitation plans, consider instructing patients to perform active movements with their unaffected hand to manage edema in the affected hand.
items.limitation: 本研究采用 B-A-B 单案例设计，样本量小，结果的普遍性受限。
items.limitationEn: This study used a B-A-B single-case design with a small sample size, limiting the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Transitional care interventions and outcome measures in stroke rehabilitation: a scoping review.
items.summary: This scoping review (N=4,663 abstracts screened) described intervention components and outcomes of transitional care interventions (TCIs) in stroke rehabilitation, identifying characteristics and outcomes across multiple care settings.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述系统地总结了卒中康复中的过渡期护理干预措施和结局指标。这能帮助你更全面地理解卒中患者从急性期到社区康复的连续性需求和现有干预模式。
items.titleZh: 卒中康复中的过渡期护理干预措施和结局指标：一项范围综述。
items.summaryZh: 这项范围综述（筛选了 4,663 篇摘要）描述了卒中康复中过渡期护理干预措施的组成部分和结局，确定了跨多个护理环境的干预特征和结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically summarizes transitional care interventions and outcome measures in stroke rehabilitation. This can help you gain a more comprehensive understanding of the continuity of care needs and existing intervention models for stroke patients from acute to community rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 本范围综述仅描述了干预措施和结局，未对干预措施的有效性进行质量评估。
items.limitationEn: This scoping review only described interventions and outcomes, without assessing the quality or effectiveness of the interventions.

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: This exploratory observational study examined pediatric physiotherapists' use of focus of attention (FOA) for instruction and feedback during telehealth sessions for clients with neurodevelopmental disorders.
items.curatedReason: 远程物理治疗中注意力焦点 (FOA) 的使用对运动学习结果至关重要，尤其在儿科神经发育障碍患者中。你需要关注在远程干预中如何有效运用 FOA 指导和反馈，以优化治疗效果。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中注意力焦点在指导和反馈中的应用：一项观察性研究。
items.summaryZh: 这项探索性观察研究探讨了儿科物理治疗师在远程医疗会话中，对患有神经发育障碍的客户进行指导和反馈时，注意力焦点 (FOA) 的使用情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: The use of focus of attention (FOA) in telerehabilitation is crucial for motor learning outcomes, especially in pediatric patients with neurodevelopmental disorders. You need to focus on how to effectively use FOA in instructions and feedback during remote interventions to optimize therapeutic effects.
items.limitation: 本研究为探索性观察研究，样本量小，且主要关注物理治疗师对 FOA 的使用，而非其直接疗效。
items.limitationEn: This was an exploratory observational study with a small sample size, focusing on physiotherapists' use of FOA rather than its direct therapeutic efficacy.

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: This assessor-blinded pragmatic RCT found that an 8-week group exercise-based telerehabilitation program was safe but not superior to a single session of in-person assessment and advice for improving health-related quality of life in cancer survivors.
items.curatedReason: 基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但其在改善生活质量方面并不优于单次物理治疗评估和建议。这意味着在推广远程康复时，你需要设定合理的期望，并评估其在特定结局上的增益是否显著。
items.titleZh: 基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但其在改善生活质量方面并不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机试验。
items.summaryZh: 这项评估者盲法的实用性随机对照试验发现，为期 8 周的基于运动的团体远程康复项目是安全的，但其在改善癌症幸存者健康相关生活质量方面并不优于单次面对面评估和建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe, but it's not superior to a single physiotherapy assessment and advice session for improving quality of life. This means you need to set realistic expectations when promoting telerehabilitation and assess whether its gains are significant for specific outcomes.
items.limitation: 本研究将远程康复与单次评估和建议进行比较，对照组干预强度较低，可能影响结果解释。
items.limitationEn: This study compared telerehabilitation with a single assessment and advice session; the control group's intervention intensity was low, which might affect the interpretation of results.

items.title: The Psychometric Properties of the Trunk Impairment Scale Used After Stroke: A Systematic Review Using COSMIN Methodology.
items.summary: 一项使用 COSMIN 方法学进行的系统综述评估了躯干功能障碍量表 (TIS) 在卒中患者中的心理测量属性，确定了TIS在卒中康复中作为评估工具的证据质量和确定性。
items.curatedReason: TIS 在卒中康复中是可靠且有效的躯干功能评估工具，但要注意其在特定人群或语境下的局限性。结合 COSMIN 方法学，这篇综述为你的临床选择提供了高级别证据。
items.titleZh: 卒中后躯干功能障碍量表的心理测量属性：一项采用 COSMIN 方法学的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项运用COSMIN方法学的系统综述，评估了躯干功能障碍量表 (TIS) 在卒中患者中的心理测量属性，为该工具在卒中康复中的应用提供了证据质量和确定性评级。
items.curatedReasonEn: TIS is a reliable and valid trunk function assessment tool in stroke rehabilitation, but be aware of its limitations in specific populations or contexts. This review, utilizing COSMIN methodology, provides high-level evidence for your clinical choice.
items.limitation: 尽管评估了证据质量，但综述本身并未报告合并效应量或具体心理测量属性的数值，因此需要查阅原始研究以获取详细数据。
items.limitationEn: While evidence quality was assessed, the review itself did not report pooled effect sizes or specific psychometric property values, requiring consultation of original studies for detailed data.

items.title: Two-Year Outcomes of the Proximal Hamstring Avulsion Rehabilitation Regimes: Longitudinal Versus Accelerated Protocol (PHARRLAP) Study: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: 一项针对60名接受近端腘绳肌腱撕脱修复术患者的随机对照试验（n=30 CR组，n=30 AR组）显示，加速康复方案与保守康复方案在2年随访中，临床结局、力量恢复、功能对称性以及并发症/再损伤率方面无显著差异。
items.curatedReason: 对于近端腘绳肌撕脱伤修复术后的康复，加速康复方案在两年内与保守方案在临床结局、力量恢复和功能对称性方面差异不大。你可以更积极地考虑加速康复。
items.titleZh: 近端腘绳肌撕脱伤康复方案两年结局：纵向对比加速方案 (PHARRLAP) 研究：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项比较近端腘绳肌撕脱伤修复术后康复方案的随机对照试验（n=60）发现，加速康复方案与保守康复方案在两年随访期内，临床结局、力量恢复和功能对称性方面并无显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: For proximal hamstring avulsion repair post-op rehab, accelerated protocols show comparable clinical outcomes, strength recovery, and functional symmetry to conservative protocols at two years. You can consider accelerated rehab more actively.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（每组30名患者），可能限制了检测到小效应差异的能力。
items.limitationEn: The study's relatively small sample size (30 patients per group) may limit its ability to detect small effect differences.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Sarcopenia Increases Adjacent Segment Degeneration Risk within 3 Years of Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion.
items.summary: 一项对333名接受颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）的成年患者进行的回顾性队列研究发现，术前肌少症显著增加了3年内发生放射学邻近节段退变（ASD）的风险。
items.curatedReason: 颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术（ACDF）后，肌少症是3年内发生邻近节段退变的风险因素。这提示术前肌少症评估和干预可能有助于改善长期预后。
items.titleZh: 肌少症增加颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术后3年内邻近节段退变风险
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究显示，在333名接受颈椎前路椎间盘切除融合术的患者中，术前存在肌少症会显著增加术后3年内发生邻近节段退变（ASD）的风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sarcopenia is a risk factor for adjacent segment degeneration within 3 years after Anterior Cervical Discectomy and Fusion (ACDF). Preoperative sarcopenia assessment and intervention may improve long-term outcomes.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素和选择偏倚，且主要结局为影像学上的邻近节段退变，其临床意义需要进一步研究确认。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, potentially subject to confounding factors and selection bias, and its primary outcome is radiographic adjacent segment degeneration, whose clinical significance requires further confirmation.

items.title: [Correspondence] Make rehabilitation count: invest in people, not just devices
items.summary: The WHO global rehabilitation indicators represent a vital shift from counting disease to measuring functioning and lives lived with quality and dignity,1 and to ensuring rehabilitation is an essentia
items.curatedReason: WHO 呼吁在全球范围内将康复作为基本医疗服务，而非奢侈品，并且要投资于人而不是仅仅关注设备。这意味着，我们物理治疗师作为康复专业人士，在医疗系统中的重要性将持续提升，你应当积极关注政策动向。
items.titleZh: 让康复发挥作用：投资于人，而非仅仅设备
items.summaryZh: 世界卫生组织（WHO）的全球康复指标标志着从关注疾病到衡量功能和生活质量的转变，并呼吁康复应成为医疗保健的必要组成部分，而非附加奢侈品，强调投资于康复专业人才而非仅是设备。
items.curatedReasonEn: The WHO advocates for rehabilitation as an essential healthcare service globally, not a luxury, emphasizing investment in people over devices. This means physical therapists, as rehabilitation professionals, will see their importance in healthcare systems grow; you should actively monitor policy developments.

items.title: Predictive socio-cultural factors of pain intensity, disability, and quality of life in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain: a prospective cohort study.
items.summary: 一项前瞻性队列研究发现，在荷兰初级保健物理治疗患者中，社会文化因素（如教育水平、移民背景）能预测非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛的短期和长期结局，基线以及3、6、12个月的疼痛强度、残疾和健康相关生活质量均与这些因素相关（n=1350）。
items.curatedReason: 社会文化因素对非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的短期和长期预后有预测作用。评估患者的社会经济和文化背景，有助于制定更全面的个体化康复计划。
items.titleZh: 非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者疼痛强度、残疾和生活质量的预测性社会文化因素：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对1350名非特异性肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的前瞻性队列研究显示，教育水平和移民背景等社会文化因素，在基线以及3、6、12个月时，均可预测其疼痛强度、残疾程度及健康相关生活质量的短期和长期结局。
items.curatedReasonEn: Sociocultural factors predict short- and long-term outcomes in patients with nonspecific musculoskeletal pain. Assess patients' socioeconomic and cultural backgrounds to develop more comprehensive, individualized rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 研究对象来自荷兰初级保健物理治疗，结果推广到其他人群或医疗系统时需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study population was drawn from Dutch primary care physiotherapy, so findings should be cautiously generalized to other populations or healthcare systems.

items.title: Reliability of digital algometer-based pressure pain threshold measurement in patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a single-center reliability study.
items.summary: 一项针对60名终末期膝骨关节炎患者的前瞻性观察性信度研究显示，数字测痛仪在测量膝关节内侧（局部）和对侧前臂背侧（远程）的压力痛阈方面具有高相对信度（ICC > 0.75）。
items.curatedReason: 数字测痛仪在终末期膝骨关节炎患者压力痛阈测量中显示出高信度。在临床实践中使用该工具评估痛阈是可靠的。
items.titleZh: 数字测痛仪在终末期膝骨关节炎患者压力痛阈测量中的信度：一项单中心信度研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对60名终末期膝骨关节炎患者的研究发现，数字测痛仪在测量局部膝关节内侧和远程对侧前臂背侧的压力痛阈时，具有高相对信度（ICC > 0.75），表明该工具在临床实践中是可靠的。
items.curatedReasonEn: The digital algometer demonstrates high reliability for pressure pain threshold measurement in end-stage knee osteoarthritis. This tool is reliable for clinical pain threshold assessment.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于终末期膝骨关节炎患者，结果可能不适用于其他疼痛类型或疾病。
items.limitationEn: The study population was limited to patients with end-stage knee osteoarthritis, so the results may not be applicable to other pain types or conditions.

items.title: Rehabilitation of Long-Standing Groin Pain in Athletes: A Scoping Review of Exercise Content and Reporting
items.summary: 一篇范围综述旨在总结运动员长期腹股沟疼痛康复中的运动内容和报告方式。
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述总结了运动员长期腹股沟疼痛康复中的运动内容。在制定此类患者的康复计划时，应参考综述提供的运动干预信息，以确保方案的全面性。
items.titleZh: 运动员长期腹股沟疼痛的康复：运动内容与报告的范围综述
items.summaryZh: 本范围综述旨在总结运动员长期腹股沟疼痛康复中的运动内容及其报告方式。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review summarizes exercise content in rehabilitation for long-standing groin pain in athletes. When designing rehab plans for these patients, refer to the exercise intervention information provided to ensure comprehensive protocols.
items.limitation: 作为范围综述，它主要侧重于映射现有文献的广度而非深度，并未对纳入研究的质量进行批判性评估，也未提供量化证据。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, it focuses on mapping the breadth rather than depth of existing literature and does not critically appraise the quality of included studies or provide quantified evidence.
items.journal: Journal of Orthopaedic & Sports Physical Therapy

items.title: Comparison of ultrasound-guided lavage and subacromial bursa injection for calcific tendinitis: A prospective, randomized, double-blind trial
items.summary: 本研究旨在通过一项前瞻性、随机、双盲试验，比较超声引导下肩峰下滑囊注射和超声引导下灌洗治疗钙化性肌腱炎的临床和超声结果。
items.curatedReason: 对于钙化性肌腱炎，超声引导下抽吸灌洗与滑囊注射的临床和超声结果对比值得关注。这项前瞻性随机双盲试验将提供两种常见干预手段的直接比较证据。
items.titleZh: 超声引导下灌洗与肩峰下滑囊注射治疗钙化性肌腱炎的比较：一项前瞻性、随机、双盲试验
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在通过一项前瞻性、随机、双盲试验，对比超声引导下灌洗与超声引导下肩峰下滑囊注射治疗钙化性肌腱炎的临床和超声影像学效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: For calcific tendinitis, comparing clinical and ultrasonographic outcomes of ultrasound-guided lavage versus subacromial bursa injection is noteworthy. This prospective, randomized, double-blind trial will provide direct comparative evidence for two common interventions.
items.limitation: 摘要仅说明研究目的，未提供具体样本量、关键结局指标、干预细节或结果数据，因此无法评估其研究质量和潜在影响。
items.limitationEn: The abstract only states the study's aim without providing specific sample size, key outcome measures, intervention details, or results, thus precluding an assessment of its quality and potential impact.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Neurogenic bowel dysfunction in multiple sclerosis: clinical determinants and its association with bladder dysfunction in a multicenter study
items.summary: 本多中心研究旨在确定多发性硬化症（MS）中神经源性肠道功能障碍的患病率和严重程度，并识别与中度至重度肠道功能障碍相关的临床因素及其与膀胱功能障碍的关联。
items.curatedReason: 多发性硬化症（MS）患者的神经源性肠道功能障碍与膀胱功能障碍密切相关。这意味着在评估和管理MS患者时，你需要同时关注肠道和膀胱功能，并采取综合康复策略。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症的神经源性肠道功能障碍：多中心研究中的临床决定因素及其与膀胱功能障碍的关联
items.summaryZh: 本多中心研究旨在确定多发性硬化症患者中神经源性肠道功能障碍的患病率和严重程度，并识别与中重度肠道功能障碍相关的临床因素及其与膀胱功能障碍的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Neurogenic bowel dysfunction in multiple sclerosis (MS) patients is closely linked to bladder dysfunction. This means you need to address both bowel and bladder function during assessment and management of MS patients, adopting comprehensive rehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 摘要仅说明研究目的，未提供具体样本量、研究设计、结局指标或结果数据，因此无法评估其研究质量和潜在影响。
items.limitationEn: The abstract only states the study's aim without providing specific sample size, study design, outcome measures, or results, thus precluding an assessment of its quality and potential impact.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Effectiveness of manual therapy with pragmatic physiotherapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain: a pilot randomized clinical trial.
items.summary: 一项针对68名持续性肩袖相关肩痛患者的非劣效性试点随机临床试验发现，与不含手法治疗的物理治疗相比，包含手法治疗的物理治疗在患者报告结局方面初步显示出潜在益处，并证实了完整随机临床试验的可行性。
items.curatedReason: 这项试点研究提示，在肩袖相关肩痛的物理治疗中，手法治疗可能作为运动疗法的有效辅助。虽然是初步结果，但值得关注手法治疗在复杂肌骨疼痛中的潜在价值。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗结合物理治疗对肩袖相关肩痛的有效性：一项试点随机临床试验
items.summaryZh: 一项招募68名持续性肩袖相关肩痛患者的试点RCT发现，含手法治疗组与不含手法治疗组相比，在患者报告结局上初步显示出积极趋势，并验证了未来大规模RCT的可行性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This pilot study suggests manual therapy may be an effective adjunct to exercise therapy for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain. While preliminary, it highlights the potential value of manual therapy in complex musculoskeletal pain.
items.limitation: 这是一项非劣效性试点研究，样本量有限（n=68），仅探讨了初步治疗效果和完整RCT的可行性，不能得出确切的疗效结论。
items.limitationEn: This was a non-inferiority pilot study with a limited sample size (n=68), exploring preliminary treatment effects and feasibility for a full RCT, thus definitive efficacy conclusions cannot be drawn.

items.title: Adapting the MSK-HQ for paediatric musculoskeletal care: Insights from a national survey and focus group of physiotherapists.
items.summary: 一项针对55名英国儿科临床医生（54名物理治疗师）的全国调查和焦点小组研究发现，他们普遍认为将成人版肌肉骨骼健康问卷 (MSK-HQ) 调整用于8-18岁儿童和青少年的肌肉骨骼护理具有相关性。
items.curatedReason: MSK-HQ 在儿科肌肉骨骼护理中的适应性得到了英国临床医生的认可。这为儿童和青少年 MSK 健康评估工具的开发提供了方向。
items.titleZh: 改编 MSK-HQ 用于儿科肌肉骨骼护理：一项全国调查和物理治疗师焦点小组的见解
items.summaryZh: 一项英国全国调查及焦点小组研究显示，55名儿科临床医生（主要为物理治疗师）普遍认为，将成人版肌肉骨骼健康问卷 (MSK-HQ) 调整后用于8-18岁儿童和青少年肌肉骨骼护理具有高度相关性。
items.curatedReasonEn: UK clinicians recognize the adaptability of MSK-HQ for pediatric musculoskeletal care. This provides direction for developing MSK health assessment tools for children and adolescents.
items.limitation: 本研究基于英国临床医生（54名物理治疗师和1名足病医生）的反馈，可能存在地理和专业范围的局限性，不代表全球观点。
items.limitationEn: This study is based on feedback from UK clinicians (54 physiotherapists and 1 podiatrist), which may limit its generalizability geographically and professionally.

items.title: Usefulness of ChatGPT in physiotherapy practice: A scoping review.
items.summary: 一项范围综述系统地梳理了截至2025年11月关于 ChatGPT 在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中应用的研究证据，发现现有研究主要关注技术如何被研究，而非其有效性或临床准备度。
items.curatedReason: ChatGPT 在物理治疗中的应用日益增多，但目前研究主要集中在技术本身，而非临床实践的有效性。在将其引入临床前，需要更多关于其实际效果和安全性的证据。
items.titleZh: ChatGPT 在物理治疗实践中的效用：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述截至2025年11月的文献，系统地绘制了ChatGPT在肌肉骨骼物理治疗中的应用证据，指出当前研究重点是如何研究该技术，而非其临床有效性或实践准备度。
items.curatedReasonEn: ChatGPT's use in physiotherapy is growing, but current research focuses on the technology itself rather than clinical effectiveness. More evidence on its practical impact and safety is needed before clinical integration.
items.limitation: 本综述侧重于ChatGPT在物理治疗中如何被研究，而非其效果，因此未能提供关于ChatGPT在临床实践中是否有效或已准备好应用的证据。
items.limitationEn: This review focused on how ChatGPT has been studied in physiotherapy, not its effectiveness, thus it does not provide evidence on whether ChatGPT is effective or ready for clinical practice.

items.title: Perceptions of Chronic Low Back Pain and Physiotherapy in India: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: 一项针对20名印度慢性下腰痛患者的定性研究，通过半结构式访谈和解释现象学分析，深入探讨了他们在社会文化背景下对慢性下腰痛和物理治疗的看法。
items.curatedReason: 在印度，文化和社会因素显著影响慢性下腰痛患者对物理治疗的认知和利用。理解这些背景对改进康复服务的可及性和依从性至关重要。
items.titleZh: 印度慢性下腰痛和物理治疗的认知：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对20名印度慢性下腰痛患者的定性研究，深入探讨了他们在社会文化背景下对慢性下腰痛和物理治疗的感知，揭示了影响康复服务利用的独特文化因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: In India, cultural and social factors significantly impact how chronic low back pain patients perceive and use physiotherapy. Understanding these contexts is crucial for improving rehabilitation service accessibility and adherence.
items.limitation: 这是一项定性研究，样本量小（20名参与者），结果反映了特定文化背景下的感知，外推至其他文化群体需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: This is a qualitative study with a small sample size (20 participants); its findings reflect perceptions within a specific cultural context and should be cautiously extrapolated to other cultural groups.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Demographic disparities in health-related social needs among caregivers of stroke survivors: an exploratory cross-sectional study.
items.summary: 一项针对81名美国卒中幸存者照护者的横断面调查发现，他们平均有6.5项未满足的健康相关社会需求（95% CI [5.69, 7.25]），其中种族和民族少数群体照护者的总需求负担显著更高。
items.curatedReason: 卒中幸存者照护者面临的健康相关社会需求存在显著的人口统计学差异，尤其是有色人种照护者。这提示临床医师在支持照护者时，需要考虑更广泛的社会因素。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者照护者健康相关社会需求的人口统计学差异：一项探索性横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对81名美国卒中幸存者照护者的横断面研究显示，他们平均存在6.5项未满足的健康相关社会需求，其中少数族裔照护者的总需求负担显著高于其他群体。
items.curatedReasonEn: Stroke survivor caregivers face significant demographic disparities in health-related social needs, especially among racial and ethnic minority caregivers. Clinicians must consider broader social factors when supporting caregivers.
items.limitation: 这是一项探索性横断面研究，样本量较小（n=81），且在特定时间段（2024年11月至2025年6月）收集数据，结果可能存在选择偏差和时效性限制。
items.limitationEn: This is an exploratory cross-sectional study with a small sample size (n=81) and data collected within a specific timeframe (November 2024 to June 2025), which may introduce selection bias and temporal limitations.

items.title: Barriers and Trends to Early Mobilization in Children With a Traumatic Brain Injury.
items.summary: 一项针对80名0-18岁创伤性脑损伤儿童的回顾性队列研究发现，在PICU住院的前14天，高强度活动在OT和PT评估中分别占比53%和56.3%，而镇静/镇痛是活动的主要障碍。
items.curatedReason: 在儿科重症监护室（PICU）中，创伤性脑损伤儿童的早期活动面临高比例的镇静限制。这表明需要更积极地管理镇静，以促进早期康复。
items.titleZh: 创伤性脑损伤儿童早期活动面临的障碍和趋势
items.summaryZh: 一项针对80名创伤性脑损伤儿童的回顾性研究显示，在儿科重症监护室中，早期高强度活动在OT和PT评估中占比分别为53%和56.3%，但镇静/镇痛是实施活动的主要障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early mobilization for children with traumatic brain injury in the pediatric ICU faces high sedation limitations. This indicates a need for more proactive sedation management to facilitate early rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，且为单中心数据，可能存在选择偏倚和结果的外推性限制。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study with single-center data, which may lead to selection bias and limit the generalizability of the findings.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: 一项针对10名健康老年人和46名住院患者的研究验证了PREEMPT活动监测器，发现其在测量步长、步数、步行时间、久坐时间及活动时间等五项移动性指标方面，与视频真实数据相比具有良好准确性和有效性。
items.curatedReason: PREEMPT 活动监测器在住院患者中具有良好的准确性和可用性。你可以考虑将这种设备纳入临床实践，以客观追踪老年患者的活动量和改善移动性。
items.titleZh: 住院患者活动监测器验证：患者/居民移动性追踪器 (PREEMPT)
items.summaryZh: 一项针对10名健康老年人和46名住院患者的研究验证了PREEMPT活动监测器，发现其在测量步长、步数、步行时间、久坐和活动时间等指标上，与视频数据相比具有良好的准确性和有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: The PREEMPT activity monitor shows good accuracy and usability in hospitalized patients. You can consider incorporating this device into clinical practice to objectively track activity levels and improve mobility in older adults.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（10名健康老年人和46名住院患者），且仅评估了特定移动性指标，其结果在更大范围和更多样的临床情境中的通用性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: The study involved a small sample size (10 healthy older adults and 46 hospitalized patients) and assessed only specific mobility metrics, which may limit the generalizability of its findings to broader and more diverse clinical settings.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Implementing Live Long Walk Strong: Practice-based evidence on adapting a physical therapy program across diverse contexts.
items.summary: 一项过程评估研究描述了“Live Long Walk Strong”老年人移动性物理治疗项目在美国退伍军人事务部下属的城市门诊、乡村门诊、专业护理机构和远程医疗等四种不同临床环境中实施时的适应性及其所遇到的障碍（n=11名物理治疗师/助理）。
items.curatedReason: “Live Long Walk Strong”项目在不同临床环境中均可成功实施，提示适应性是提高老年康复项目可及性的关键。在将成熟项目引入新环境时，应注重其适应性。
items.titleZh: 实施“Live Long Walk Strong”：在不同背景下调整物理治疗项目的实践证据
items.summaryZh: 一项过程评估研究显示，“Live Long Walk Strong”老年移动性物理治疗项目在美国退伍军人事务部的四种不同临床环境中，通过适应性调整成功实施，突显了适应性对于项目推广的关键作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: The "Live Long Walk Strong" program successfully adapts to diverse clinical settings, highlighting that adaptability is key to enhancing the accessibility of geriatric rehabilitation programs. Emphasize adaptability when introducing established programs into new environments.
items.limitation: 这是一项过程评估，而非随机对照试验，未能提供项目对患者结局的量化有效性证据，且参与物理治疗师/助理仅11名。
items.limitationEn: This was a process evaluation, not an RCT, and did not provide quantified evidence of the program's effectiveness on patient outcomes. Only 11 physical therapists/assistants participated.
items.journal: PM & R : the journal of injury, function, and rehabilitation

items.title: Physiotherapy management of Long-COVID: an evidence-based approach.
items.summary: 一篇综述描述了长新冠（Long-COVID）的异质性、偶发性和多系统性特征，并基于现有证据，阐述了针对该疾病后遗症的物理治疗管理策略。
items.curatedReason: 长新冠的物理治疗管理应基于当前的证据，采取多系统和个体化的方法。关注“隐形疾病”患者的需求，帮助他们应对复杂的症状。
items.titleZh: 长新冠的物理治疗管理：一种基于证据的方法
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述基于现有证据，阐述了长新冠（Long-COVID）的物理治疗管理策略，强调其异质性、偶发性和多系统性，并指出管理策略对改善患者生活质量的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Physiotherapy management for Long-COVID should be evidence-based, multisystem, and individualized. Focus on patients with "invisible illnesses" to help them cope with complex symptoms.
items.limitation: 这是一篇基于现有证据的综述，而非原始研究，因此其结论的强度受限于所引用文献的质量和可用性。
items.limitationEn: This is a review based on existing evidence, not original research, so the strength of its conclusions is limited by the quality and availability of the cited literature.

items.title: Health Literacy During Inpatient Rehabilitation and Its Association with One-Year Health and Functional Outcomes in Individuals with Traumatic Spinal Cord Injury
items.summary: 本研究旨在评估创伤性脊髓损伤患者在住院康复期间有限健康素养的普遍性及其相关因素，并考察有限健康素养与一年后健康和功能结局不佳的关联。
items.curatedReason: 在创伤性脊髓损伤（SCI）住院康复期间，健康素养水平低的患者在一年后的健康和功能结局更差。评估患者的健康素养，并提供适当的教育支持，对于优化康复效果至关重要。
items.titleZh: 住院康复期间健康素养与创伤性脊髓损伤患者一年后健康和功能结局的关联
items.summaryZh: 本研究旨在评估创伤性脊髓损伤患者在住院康复期间健康素养的普遍性及影响因素，并探讨其与一年后较差的健康和功能结局之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients with low health literacy during inpatient rehabilitation for traumatic spinal cord injury (SCI) have poorer health and functional outcomes at one year. Assessing health literacy and providing appropriate educational support is crucial for optimizing rehabilitation outcomes.
items.limitation: 这是一项旨在评估关联性的研究，不能确立因果关系；且只关注了住院康复期间的健康素养，可能未能捕捉其动态变化或更广泛的社会决定因素。
items.limitationEn: This study aims to assess associations, not establish causality; it focuses solely on health literacy during inpatient rehabilitation, potentially missing dynamic changes or broader social determinants.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Effects of Aerobic Exercise on Inflammatory Biomarkers, Pain Intensity, and Quality of Life in Patients with Non-Specific Chronic Low Back Pain: A Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: 一项针对41名非特异性慢性下腰痛患者的随机对照试验发现，为期12周的有氧运动结合健康教育显著改善了炎症生物标志物、疼痛强度和生活质量，而健康教育对照组无此改善。
items.curatedReason: 有氧运动显著改善了非特异性慢性下腰痛患者的炎症生物标志物、疼痛强度和生活质量。将其纳入你的常规康复方案，作为一线干预。
items.titleZh: 有氧运动对非特异性慢性下腰痛患者炎症生物标志物、疼痛强度和生活质量的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对41名非特异性慢性下腰痛患者的随机对照试验显示，为期12周的有氧运动显著改善了患者的炎症生物标志物、疼痛强度和生活质量，而健康教育对照组则无此改善。
items.curatedReasonEn: Aerobic exercise significantly improves inflammatory biomarkers, pain intensity, and quality of life in patients with non-specific chronic low back pain. Incorporate it into your standard rehabilitation protocols as a first-line intervention.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（n=41），可能需要更大规模的试验来确认这些结果，并进一步探索长期效果。
items.limitationEn: The study's sample size is relatively small (n=41), and larger trials may be needed to confirm these results and explore long-term effects.

items.title: Effects of electrical stimulation on lower limb function after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a systematic review and network meta-analysis | BMC Musculoskeletal Disorders | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 一项系统综述和网络 Meta 分析比较了不同电刺激模式结合康复训练对 ACL 重建术后患者下肢功能改善的治疗效果。
items.curatedReason: 对于 ACL 重建术后患者，电刺激结合康复训练能显著改善下肢功能。这份网络 Meta 分析为你提供了不同电刺激模式的比较，指导你优化康复方案。
items.titleZh: 电刺激对ACL重建术后下肢功能影响的系统综述和网络Meta分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和网络 Meta 分析比较了不同电刺激模式联合康复训练对 ACL 重建术后患者下肢功能改善的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: For patients post-ACL reconstruction, electrical stimulation combined with rehabilitation training significantly improves lower limb function. This network meta-analysis provides a comparison of different electrical stimulation modalities, guiding you to optimize rehabilitation protocols.
items.limitation: 网络 Meta 分析中的间接比较可能存在局限性，需注意异质性。
items.limitationEn: Indirect comparisons in network meta-analysis may have limitations, and heterogeneity needs to be considered.

items.title: Six-session non-operative exercise program yields sustained benefits for up to 18 months in end-stage knee osteoarthritis: a retrospective cohort study - Clinical Rheumatology
items.summary: 一项回顾性队列研究显示，针对等待全膝关节置换的终末期膝关节骨关节炎患者，为期六次的非手术运动方案可带来长达18个月的持续益处。
items.curatedReason: 针对等待全膝关节置换的终末期膝关节骨关节炎患者，六次非手术运动方案可带来长达 18 个月的持续益处。这给你与患者和骨科医生讨论保守治疗提供了有力证据。
items.titleZh: 六次非手术运动方案为终末期膝骨关节炎带来长达18个月的持续益处：回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究表明，针对等待全膝关节置换的终末期膝关节骨关节炎患者，为期六次的非手术运动方案能提供长达18个月的持续益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: A six-session non-operative exercise program yields sustained benefits for up to 18 months in end-stage knee osteoarthritis patients awaiting TKR. This provides strong evidence for you to discuss conservative treatment with patients and orthopedic surgeons.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，存在潜在的选择偏倚和混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, subject to potential selection bias and confounding factors.

items.title: Tale of quadriceps and hamstring muscle strength after ACL ...
items.summary: 一项带有纵向和多变量 Meta 分析的系统综述，详细探讨了 ACL 重建术后股四头肌和腘绳肌力量的变化。
items.curatedReason: 这项带有纵向和多变量Meta分析的系统综述深入分析了ACL重建术后股四头肌和腘绳肌力量的变化。这为你提供了评估术后恢复和制定力量训练计划的关键证据。
items.titleZh: ACL重建术后股四头肌和腘绳肌力量的叙述：一项带有纵向和多变量Meta分析的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项带有纵向和多变量Meta分析的系统综述，详细探讨了ACL重建术后股四头肌和腘绳肌力量的变化。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review with longitudinal and multivariate meta-analysis deeply analyzes changes in quadriceps and hamstring muscle strength after ACL reconstruction. This provides you with critical evidence for evaluating postoperative recovery and developing strength training plans.
items.limitation: Meta分析的异质性可能影响结果的普遍适用性。
items.limitationEn: Heterogeneity in meta-analysis may affect the general applicability of the results.

items.title: Management and implementation of intermittent catheterisation in neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction: a clinical practice guideline in Germany – update 3.0 | International Urology and Nephrology | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 德国更新了针对神经源性下尿路功能障碍患者间歇性导尿的管理和实施临床实践指南（3.0版）。
items.curatedReason: 德国更新了神经源性下尿路功能障碍间歇性导尿的临床实践指南，重点关注管理和实施。如果你在服务神经科患者，尤其是来自德国或在类似监管环境下执业，这份指南是必备参考。
items.titleZh: 德国神经源性下尿路功能障碍间歇性导尿管理与实施临床实践指南更新3.0版
items.summaryZh: 德国更新了神经源性下尿路功能障碍患者间歇性导尿管理和实施的临床实践指南（3.0版）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Germany has updated its clinical practice guideline for intermittent catheterization in neurogenic lower urinary tract dysfunction, focusing on management and implementation. If you serve neurological patients, especially those from Germany or practicing in similar regulatory environments, this guideline is an essential reference.

items.title: Fusogenic therapy restored spinal cord function after complete transection - Spinal Surgery News
items.summary: 一个国际研究团队通过融合疗法和综合康复，在动物模型中成功恢复了脊髓完全横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能，该研究成果已发表在《PLOS One》杂志。
items.curatedReason: 国际团队在动物模型中通过融合疗法和综合康复，成功恢复了脊髓完全横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能。这预示着脊髓损伤的康复突破，虽然仍处于动物实验阶段，但值得密切关注。
items.titleZh: 融合疗法恢复了脊髓完全横断后的功能
items.summaryZh: 国际团队在动物模型中利用融合疗法和综合康复，成功恢复了脊髓完全横断后的运动、感觉和盆腔功能。
items.curatedReasonEn: An international team has successfully restored motor, sensory, and pelvic functions after complete spinal cord transection in animal models, using fusogenic therapy combined with comprehensive rehabilitation. This heralds a breakthrough in spinal cord injury rehabilitation; though still in animal trials, it warrants close attention.
items.limitation: 这是一项动物模型研究，结果能否转化到人体尚不确定。
items.limitationEn: This is an animal model study, and it is uncertain whether the results can be translated to humans.

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: 一项定性分析发现，275名ACL损伤患者中，决定重返运动的关键因素包括“动机与驱动力”、“治疗与康复”以及“医学许可与准备度”三大类。
items.curatedReason: 患者决定 ACL 损伤后重返运动的关键因素是心理状态、努力程度和支持。评估和干预时，不只看生理指标，还要纳入这些主观要素。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力与支持——ACL损伤患者重返运动决策的基础：NACOX队列定性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对275名ACL损伤患者的定性分析显示，患者决定重返运动的关键因素可归纳为“动机与驱动力”、“治疗与康复”及“医学许可与准备度”三类。
items.curatedReasonEn: Patients' decision to return to sport after ACL injury hinges on mindset, effort, and support. When assessing and intervening, incorporate these subjective factors beyond just physiological metrics.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性分析，无法提供量化效应或因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This study is a qualitative analysis and cannot provide quantitative effects or causal relationships.
items.journal: Physical therapy in sport : official journal of the Association of Chartered Physiotherapists in Sports Medicine

items.title: Acupuncture for postoperative rehabilitation in degenerative lumbar spinal diseases: mechanisms and clinical evidence | European Spine Journal | Springer Nature Link
items.summary: 一篇综述探讨了针灸在退行性腰椎疾病术后康复中的机制和临床证据。

items.title: Urogenital Hiatus Closure System: A Framework for Understanding how Muscle, Motor Control, and Fascial Connections Interact in Normal and Failed Closure
items.summary: 一项研究提出了泌尿生殖道裂孔闭合系统框架，以理解肌肉、运动控制和筋膜连接在正常和功能失调闭合中的相互作用。
items.curatedReason: 这份关于泌尿生殖道裂孔闭合系统的框架性研究，有助于你更深入地理解盆底功能障碍的肌肉、运动控制和筋膜连接的相互作用。在评估盆底功能时，应综合考虑这些因素。
items.titleZh: 泌尿生殖道裂孔闭合系统：理解肌肉、运动控制与筋膜连接在正常和失效闭合中相互作用的框架
items.summaryZh: 一项研究提出了泌尿生殖道裂孔闭合系统框架，以帮助理解肌肉、运动控制和筋膜连接在正常及功能失调闭合中的相互作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This framework study on the urogenital hiatus closure system helps you gain a deeper understanding of the interaction between muscles, motor control, and fascial connections in pelvic floor dysfunction. When assessing pelvic floor function, these factors should be considered comprehensively.
items.limitation: 这是一项框架性研究，并非干预性试验，没有具体治疗效果数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a framework study, not an interventional trial, so there is no specific treatment outcome data.

items.title: Functional Status after Ventral Hernia Repair: Longitudinal Trends and the Limits of Improvement
items.summary: 一项前瞻性试点研究（NCT05142618）分析了腹壁疝修复术后患者的功能状态，通过定时起立行走（TUG）和五次坐站（5xSTS）测试评估，发现功能评分随时间改善，但存在改善的局限性。
items.curatedReason: 腹壁疝修复术后的功能状态在术后会随时间改善，但存在改善的局限性。这提示你在术后康复中，应现实地设定患者功能恢复目标，并关注长期功能维持。
items.titleZh: 腹壁疝修复术后的功能状态：纵向趋势与改善的局限性
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性研究评估了腹壁疝修复术后功能状态，发现TUG和5xSTS测试评分随时间改善，但存在改善局限性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Functional status after ventral hernia repair improves over time post-surgery, but with limitations. This suggests you should set realistic functional recovery goals for patients during postoperative rehabilitation and focus on long-term functional maintenance.
items.limitation: 这是一项试点研究，样本量和随访时间有限，长期结果需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a pilot study with limited sample size and follow-up duration; long-term results require further validation.
